title: persicaria minor subsp. subsessilis
intro: Persicaria minor subsp. subsessilis, also known as lesser meadowsweet, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its small white flowers and hairy stems. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Lesser meadowsweet can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
